roles.label: Administrator
roles.description: Full system access including user management and configuration

roles.label: Dispatcher
roles.description: Manage trains, routes, signals, and alerts. Generate reports.

roles.label: Operator
roles.description: Manage trains and alerts. Read-only access to stations, signals, routes.

roles.label: Maintenance Engineer
roles.description: Manage maintenance tasks and signals. Read-only access to operational data.

roles.label: Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to all operational data. No mutations.
